serving.description: 3 tarts (1 Hojicha Yuzu, 1 Mango Pomelo, 1 Pandan Kaya)
serving.natural_language_portion: One serving is 3 individual premium artisan tarts (approximately 50 g each), totalling approximately 150 g, as sold by Kazo Premium at Funan, Singapore.

nutrient_source.title: Fruit tart / custard tart nutrient profile estimated from USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy: Tart, fruit (ID 18354) and Pastry, Danish (ID 18266), weighted composite for butter-pastry tart with fruit and cream filling
nutrient_source.organization: USDA Agricultural Research Service – FoodData Central SR Legacy
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: No exact HPB Singapore Foodo entry exists for this specific multi-flavour artisan tart set. Nutrient values are estimated from USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy entries for fruit tart (USDA FDC ID 18354) and butter pastry / Danish pastry (USDA FDC ID 18266), weighted to reflect a butter-pastry shell (~40% by weight) with mixed fruit-cream filling (~60% by weight). The three tart flavours (Hojicha Yuzu, Mango Pomelo, Pandan Kaya) each contribute different micronutrient profiles; macros are averaged across the set. Values represent a reasonable central estimate; actual values may vary by recipe.

gi_source.title: Glycemic index of pastry / tart products estimated from University of Sydney GI Database analogous entries: shortcrust pastry and fruit tart analogues; Atkinson FS et al. (2021) International Tables of Glycemic Index and Glycemic Load Values 2021, Diabetes Care
gi_source.organization: University of Sydney GI Database; Diabetes Care (peer-reviewed journal)
gi_source.source_match_notes: No direct GI measurement exists for this specific Singapore artisan tart set. GI estimated at 55, which is classified as low, based on analogous butter-pastry tart and shortcrust pastry entries in the University of Sydney GI Database and Atkinson et al. 2021 International Tables. The butter-pastry shell contributes a moderate GI (~55–60) due to fat-slowing of glucose absorption; fruit fillings (mango, yuzu, pandan) contribute moderate sugar loads. Glycemic load per serving calculated as (GI × carbohydrate_g_per_serving) / 100 = (55 × 55.3) / 100 ≈ 30.4, where carbohydrate per 150 g serving = 40.5 × 1.5 = 60.75 g of total carbohydrate, adjusted for fibre to available carbohydrate ≈ 55.3 g.

hypertension.key_factor: Moderate sodium content (~278 mg per 150 g serving) and high saturated fat from butter pastry shell
hypertension.guidance: Individuals with hypertension should limit this tart set to an occasional treat, as the combined sodium (~278 mg per serving) and saturated fat content may contribute to blood pressure elevation and vascular stiffness when consumed regularly.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: High available carbohydrate (~55 g per serving) and high sugar content (~33 g per serving) resulting in a high glycemic load (~30)
type2_diabetes.guidance: People with Type 2 Diabetes should exercise caution with this tart set. Despite a technically low glycemic index of approximately 55, the high sugar and available carbohydrate content (~55 g per 150 g serving) results in a high glycemic load (~30), which can cause significant postprandial blood glucose elevation; portion should be strictly limited or avoided.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: High saturated fat (~13.7 g per serving) and cholesterol (~102 mg per serving) from butter pastry and egg-based fillings
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Individuals with cardiovascular disease should limit consumption of this tart set due to its high saturated fat content (~13.7 g per 150 g serving) from butter pastry and kaya filling, which may adversely affect LDL cholesterol levels and cardiovascular risk when consumed frequently.

llm_training.natural_language_description: The Seasonal Tart Mix & Match – 3 Pieces is a premium artisan dessert set sold by Kazo Premium at Funan Mall, Singapore. The set comprises three individual tarts: (1) Ho-Ho-Hojicha Yuzu Tart – a butter-pastry shell filled with hojicha (Japanese roasted green tea) cream and yuzu citrus curd, offering a bittersweet, earthy flavour with bright citrus notes; (2) Oh-Honey Mango Pomelo Tart – a buttery tart shell filled with honey-sweetened mango cream and fresh pomelo segments, delivering tropical sweetness balanced by the mild bitterness of pomelo; and (3) Pandan Kaya Garden Tart – a tart shell filled with pandan-infused kaya (a Southeast Asian coconut-egg jam), representing a classic Singaporean flavour profile with fragrant, sweet, and slightly caramelised notes. Each tart weighs approximately 50 g, giving a total serving weight of approximately 150 g. The tarts are baked and assembled using a rich butter-pastry shell, eggs, cream, and fruit-based fillings. Nutritionally, the set is energy-dense (~477 kcal per serving), high in sugar (~33 g) and saturated fat (~13.7 g), and provides a high glycemic load (~30). The pandan and kaya filling reflects Singapore's Peranakan culinary heritage, while the hojicha and yuzu components reflect Japanese-influenced modern patisserie trends popular in Singapore's premium dessert scene. This product is suitable for vegetarians but contains gluten, dairy, and eggs. It is best consumed as an occasional indulgence and is not suitable for individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes, obesity, or cardiovascular disease without strict portion control.

Is the seasonal tart set halal?

Is the hojicha yuzu tart suitable for diabetics?
What is the glycemic index of a fruit tart?

confidence_reason: No exact HPB Singapore Foodo or ICMR-NIN entry exists for this specific multi-flavour artisan tart set. Nutrient values are estimated from USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy analogous entries for fruit tart and butter pastry, weighted by component proportions. GI is estimated from University of Sydney GI Database analogous pastry entries. Confidence is medium because the estimation methodology is defensible and documented, but actual recipe-specific values from Kazo Premium are not publicly available in any approved source database.
notes: 1. Nutrient values are estimated from USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy (fruit tart USDA FDC ID 18354 and Danish/butter pastry USDA FDC ID 18266) as no exact Singapore-specific entry exists in HPB Foodo or FAO/INFOODS SEA for this product. 2. vitamin_d_mcg is -1 as it is not reported in the USDA SR Legacy source entries used for this estimation. 3. vitamin_e_mg is -1 as it is not reported in the USDA SR Legacy source entries used for this estimation. 4. selenium_mcg is -1 as it is not reported in the USDA SR Legacy source entries used for this estimation. 5. GI of 55 is an analogous estimate based on University of Sydney GI Database butter-pastry and fruit tart entries; no direct GI measurement for this specific product exists. 6. Halal status is listed as false as Kazo Premium's halal certification status is not confirmed in publicly available approved sources at time of processing. 7. The three tart flavours (Hojicha Yuzu, Mango Pomelo, Pandan Kaya) each contribute distinct micronutrient profiles; the per_100g values represent a weighted average across the set. 8. Price is SGD 15.80 for the 3-piece set as recorded from GrabFood Singapore source data.
